needed_mathlib_context.why_needed: To access the multiset of parts of a partition.
To relate the sum of parts to the integer n.
To bound the number of nonzero parts by the total number of parts; used in the forward direction to show that the length condition implies the number of nonzero parts is ≤ N.
To relate the cardinality of the multiset of parts of an NPartition (which is N) to the number of nonzero parts.
To know that the total number of parts in an NPartition is N.
To bound the number of nonzero parts of an NPartition by N.
To show that the sum of nonzero parts equals the total sum; used in the reverse direction for the sum condition of Nat.Partition.
To prove the antitone condition for the forward construction when sorting parts descending.

needed_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: Multiset.sort r s is sorted with respect to r
needed_mathlib_context.why_needed: To know that the sorted list of parts is descending.
